response:
One complete sequence uses three spins plus two leaps.
She earns money for each spin and leap.
Total spins equal three times the number of sequences.
Total leaps equal two times the number of sequences.
Three hours contain sixty minutes total.
Each sequence takes five minutes to finish.
Thus twelve sequences occur in one day.
Thirty-six spins happen during the day.
Twenty-four leaps happen during the day.
Base earnings equal thirty-six times one point five plus twenty-four times two point five.
This sum equals fifty-four plus sixty.
Total base earnings are one hundred fourteen dollars.
Time dependent growth applies to the final sum.
The factor uses time in hours as three.
Exponential growth multiplies the base by e to the power of zero point one five.
Final earnings equal one hundred fourteen times e to the power of zero point one five.
No two adjacent words start with consecutive letters.
